store_header.notes: n=22. Header text is body-size and slightly lighter (cap_rel med 1.000, stroke_rel med 0.912). Real scans print text, not the full brand logo.

transaction.notes: n=53. Cashier/check/trans block is slightly smaller (cap_rel med 0.952), normal weight.

note.notes: n=5. NOTE caption is smaller (cap_rel med 0.930); stroke_rel med 1.103 is below the bold threshold and sample is small.

item.notes: n=51. Item rows are the body baseline (cap_rel med 1.011, stroke_rel med 0.988).

summary.notes: n=45. DRIVE/TAX/Tender/Change rows run a touch larger (cap_rel med 1.059), normal/light stroke.

total_line.notes: n=29. Amount Due and AUTH AMT are the true heavy rows (stroke_rel med 1.393); render with heavy face.

payment.notes: n=115. Card/auth detail block is body-size and slightly light (stroke_rel med 0.971).

footer.notes: n=42. Footer/THANK YOU/date lines are near body size (cap_rel med 1.024); THANK YOU is visually centered but not a distinct face.

barcode_caption.notes: n=13. Numeric header captions are near body size (cap_rel med 0.978).
